252:     for tIdx, unrollLength in pypto.loop_unroll(0, t, 1, name="IndexerPrologQuantQuantLoop", idx_name="tIdx",
253:                                                 unroll_list=unroll_list, ):

261:             t_tile = unrollLength

267:             q_norm_scale = pypto.view(q_norm_scale_in, [t_tile, 1], [tIdx, 0], valid_shape=[t_tile, 1])

274:             pypto.set_semantic_label("Query-Dequant")
276:             q_f32 = pypto.cast(q_s32, pypto.DT_FP32)
278:             q_f32 = q_f32 * w_qb_scale
281:             q_bf16 = pypto.reshape(q_cast, [t_tile, head_num, head_dim], valid_shape=[t_tile, head_num, head_dim])
298:             pypto.set_semantic_label("Query-Hadamard")
301:             q_hadamard = pypto.matmul(q_concat, hadamard_q, x_dtype)
303:             pypto.set_semantic_label("Query-Quant")
305:             q_res = prolog_quant(q_hadamard)

321:             k_bf16 = pypto.cast(quant_layer_norm(k, gamma_2d, beta_2d, -1, attrs.eps), x_dtype)
330:             pypto.set_semantic_label("Key-Hadamard")
332:             pypto.set_semantic_label("Key-Quant")

341:             k_scale_out.move(pypto.scatter_update(k_cache_scale, SCATTER_DIM, index, k_scale_4D))

349:             weights = pypto.cast(pypto.matmul(x, w_proj, x_dtype), pypto.DT_FP32)
352:             pypto.assemble(weights_f16, [tIdx, 0], weights_out)

anchors.description: The case marks x_in, q_norm_in, rope inputs and KV cache tensors as dynamic.
This is the source loop that later materializes into multiple PATH branches.
Cube matmul stage for query projection.
Vector-side dequant and scale restoration after INT32 query projection.
A second cube stage after rope and concat.
Key projection enters a separate semantic stage and later produces runtime-heavy tasks.
Key quant result is reshaped and written into KV cache via scatter_update.
Weight-side linear stage produces an additional execution branch in the same loop body.
